title: How do I sync personal and academic calendars on the Student Hub?
plain_text: The Student Hub is a platform specially designed to integrate various facets of student life into a central digital location. At this time, only Northeastern students have access to the Hub, its features, and its applications. The Hub can be students' home base for key course information, applications, resources, and community engagement. The following article shows you how to sync personal and academic calendars in the Student Hub. Sync calendars on the Student Hub Log in to the to the Student Hub . Select 'View Full Calendar' under the 'My Day' section. You will be redirected to your Outlook calendar. Select 'Add Calendar' underneath the calendar overview. Select 'Subscribe from Web'. Add a link from iCloud, Google, or your personal Outlook calendar. You need to publish a calendar to get a link to it. Select 'Import'. Note: The sync process needs time. You may not immediately see your newly added calendar on the Student Hub. You can try to refresh the hub after adding a new calendar.
body_html:
The Student Hub is a platform specially designed to integrate various facets of student life into a central digital location. At this time, only Northeastern students have access to the Hub, its features, and its applications. The Hub can be students' home base for key course information, applications, resources, and community engagement. The following article shows you how to sync personal and academic calendars in the Student Hub.

Sync calendars on the Student Hub

  • Log in to the to the Student Hub.
  • Select 'View Full Calendar' under the 'My Day' section. You will be redirected to your Outlook calendar.
  • Select 'Add Calendar' underneath the calendar overview.
  • Select 'Subscribe from Web'.
  • Add a link from iCloud, Google, or your personal Outlook calendar. You need to publish a calendar to get a link to it.
  • Select 'Import'. Note: The sync process needs time. You may not immediately see your newly added calendar on the Student Hub. You can try to refresh the hub after adding a new calendar.

sections.text: The Student Hub is a platform specially designed to integrate various facets of student life into a central digital location. At this time, only Northeastern students have access to the Hub, its features, and its applications. The Hub can be students' home base for key course information, applications, resources, and community engagement. The following article shows you how to sync personal and academic calendars in the Student Hub.

sections.heading: Sync calendars on the Student Hub
sections.text: Log in to the to the Student Hub. Select 'View Full Calendar' under the 'My Day' section. You will be redirected to your Outlook calendar. Select 'Add Calendar' underneath the calendar overview. Select 'Subscribe from Web'. Add a link from iCloud, Google, or your personal Outlook calendar. You need to publish a calendar to get a link to it. Select 'Import'. Note: The sync process needs time. You may not immediately see your newly added calendar on the Student Hub. You can try to refresh the hub after adding a new calendar.
steps: Log in to the to the Student Hub.
Select 'View Full Calendar' under the 'My Day' section.
Select 'Add Calendar' underneath the calendar overview.
Add a link from iCloud, Google, or your personal Outlook calendar.
